title: Consensus Protocols (Paxos/Raft)
description: Master the core principles of consensus protocols like Paxos and Raft. Explain how distributed leaders are elected and logs are replicated across a majority of nodes to achieve a single consistent state.
objectives: Master the core principles of consensus protocols like Paxos and Raft.
Explain how distributed leaders are elected and logs are replicated across a majority of nodes to achieve a single consistent state.
